title: Geographic Health: Unhealthy Regions Alert
description: Identifies regions with degraded or unreachable instances across all cloud providers. Highlights regions needing immediate attention for operational response.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Multicloud Health Logs' and ('Status' = 'degraded' or 'Status' = 'unreachable') | stats count as alert_count, unique('Host Name') as affected_instances by 'Cloud Provider', 'Region', 'Status' | sort -alert_count

ask_ai_prompts: Prioritize the unhealthy regions by likely operational impact and affected instance count.
Explain whether the failures are clustered by one provider, one geography, or one status pattern.
